# Alexander Campos

Independent researcher and engineer. Builds local-first cognitive infrastructure.

## What I Build

ForgeFrame: Local-first memory system for AI agents. Persistent memory with strength decay, constitutional principles that never decay, and MCP-native integration. SQLite + FTS5. Runs on a laptop.

Reframed: Resume analysis platform that preserves your voice instead of replacing it with recruiter-speak. Voice fingerprinting, multi-reader semantic analysis, streaming AI. Live at reframed.works.

Guardian: Desktop cognitive workspace with reframe detection (7 types across 8 identity dimensions), awareness-trap detection, knowledge graph, and local-only inference.

Distillery: Phone-to-local-inference pipeline. Share a URL from iOS, Mac extracts content via yt-dlp, Ollama distills through a constitutional lens, results stored locally.

## Research

Guardian Labs (guardian-labs.org): Independent research at the intersection of psychiatry, computational neuroscience, and philosophy of mind.

GL-001: Discrete triple-network coupling architectures orthogonal to psychiatric diagnosis. Preprint on bioRxiv.

## Writing

On Observation and Identity Modeling: How systems build models of the people who use them, and what happens when the model starts shaping the person.

## Services Available

ForgeFrame Setup & Integration: Deploy persistent memory infrastructure for AI agents. MCP-native, SQLite-backed. Works with Claude Desktop, Cursor, or any MCP client.

Agent Infrastructure: Model routing across Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama. Tier-based dispatch, cost optimization (40-60% reduction), streaming SSE normalization.

Local-First Architecture Consulting: Audit AI stacks for cloud dependencies. Design sovereignty-preserving migration paths.

Memory System Design: Custom semantic memory with FTS5 search, embedding integration, weighted retrieval with strength decay.

## Booking

Schedule a call: https://cal.com/alexcampos/30min
Email: adc.acampos@gmail.com

## Technical Capabilities

Languages: TypeScript, Python, SQL
Frameworks: Astro, React, Next.js, Electron, Node.js, Flask
AI: Anthropic API, OpenAI API, Ollama, Model Context Protocol, structured tool-use, semantic memory, streaming SSE
Data: SQLite/FTS5, PostgreSQL, Snowflake, Splunk
Infrastructure: Local-first architecture, air-gapped inference, MCP servers, privacy-preserving pipelines

## Principles

Sovereignty: Sensitive cognitive data never leaves the machine.
Architecture: Single source of truth. Local-first with cloud as optional acceleration.
Product: Ship the wedge, expand to the platform.
Voice: Direct, honest, no corporate-speak.
Building: The work is real even when the world hasn't caught up yet.
